articles.title: 4 foreigners caught moving cash exceeding $20k into S’pore; 43 nabbed for tax, duties evasion at checkpoints
articles.content: SINGAPORE – Four foreigners were caught moving cash exceeding $20,000 into Singapore during a week-long enforcement operation, the authorities said on May 15. More than 12,000 travellers and 420 vehicles were checked at Singapore’s land, air and sea checkpoints. Officers also scanned or searched more than 18,000 pieces of luggage and hand-carry bags during the operation
